Academic Sources

References

All sources cited in alphabetized APA format, updated weekly.

Week 1

Home & About — General Peru

Central Intelligence Agency. (2024). Peru. In The World Factbook. https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/peru/

Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. (2013). Book of Mormon: Another testament of Jesus Christ. The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

INEI — Instituto Nacional de Estadística e Informática. (2023). Perú: Principales indicadores departamentales 2015–2022. https://www.inei.gob.pe/

Lonely Planet. (2024). Introduction to Peru. https://www.lonelyplanet.com/peru

National Geographic Society. (2024). Peru. https://www.nationalgeographic.com/travel/destination/peru

World Meteorological Organization. (2023). Climate classification systems. https://www.wmo.int/

📚 APA 7th Edition Format Note

All references follow APA 7th edition formatting: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of work: Capital letter also for subtitle. Publisher. DOI or URL. References are listed in alphabetical order by first author's last name within each weekly section.

Peru: Earth Science Exploration

Ensign College · Earth Science · 2026

🇵🇪 Made with pride by a son of Peru
